Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 324}Oh man, this is bad... Where did I drop my student handbook...?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 324}Do you need something? I'm a little busy now... Hey, wait, that handbook you're holding...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 324}Can I see that student handbook? I was just looking for mine...![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 324}It IS mine! Phew... Thanks, you saved me![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 324}...Oh yeah, as a thank-you, here, take this.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_002_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 324}I got this for free when I was shopping at Aohige Pharmacy, but I don't own a cat.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 324}Anyway, if you have no use for it, just give it to one of the cats at the strip mall.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_003_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 324}I see... Sorry for demanding to see your stuff all of a sudden...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 324}Oh man, where did I drop it...? I gotta try to remember...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_004_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 324}If you have no use for that, just give it to one of the cats at the strip mall.[n]{f 1 1}
